description_long: This storage box features a robust rectangular frame with a recessed top and visible wooden slats forming the sides. The wood panels are arranged horizontally and secured with visible fasteners, giving the box a sturdy, industrial look. The top surface is bordered by a raised lip, with a section of the top covered by a matching wooden panel, suggesting a partial sliding or removable lid. The box's exterior is primarily a natural wood color, with a muted tan or beige frame that contrasts with the wood grain. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the design is utilitarian, likely intended for heavy-duty storage. Its size and construction suggest it is suitable for placement in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, rectangular storage box with a tan frame and horizontal wooden slats, featuring a recessed top and partial wooden cover. The design is sturdy and industrial, suitable for garages or outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the box with two columns of horizontal wooden slats and a partial wooden cover on the recessed top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a single column of wooden slats and the edge of the recessed top, with the partial wooden cover visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single column of wooden slats and the opposite side of the recessed top, with the partial wooden cover on the right.
description_view_3: Front view similar to view 0, showing the full width with two columns of wooden slats and the partial wooden cover on the recessed top.
